name: Lumière Restaurant Website
description: Modern restaurant website with menu, events, and reservation system
logs: Built complete restaurant website with homepage, menu, events, and reservations
Integrated Teable API for dishes, events, and reservations management
Created reservation system with time slot selection and booking form
Applied warm, elegant design theme with amber/terracotta color palette
Updated design to Atlas Bar inspired Art Deco aesthetic with refined gold accents and sophisticated typography
Verified menu page fetches from Dishes table (tblIz9nhFBYofTkFgLI) and events page from Events table (tbljCRcjyfeacwPywOg) with correct field mappings
Added error handling and debugging to menu and events pages with helpful empty state messages
Fixed Teable API integration - menu and events pages now call Teable library directly from server components for reliable data fetching
Added comprehensive debug logging to Teable library to diagnose JSON parsing errors and API response issues
Recreated API routes for dishes, events, and featured dishes with client-side fetching to resolve Teable connection issues
Enhanced events API route with detailed environment variable checking and response logging to diagnose JSON parsing errors
Simplified events API to fetch all events first then filter client-side, added total events count for better debugging
Fixed CSS syntax error by removing problematic tw-animate-css import that was causing build failures
Added image fallback handling and debugging to menu page with support for both url and thumbnail properties from Teable attachment fields
Added sample events fallback to display when Teable database is empty, ensuring events page always shows content with generated event images
Confirmed reservation system properly fetches time slots from Reservation Slots table (tblMUeVFWXDpYFChdgd) dynamically based on selected date
Fixed time slot date filtering by using 'isWithin' operator with exactDate mode for proper date matching in Teable API, added comprehensive logging to reservation slots API
Added fallback default time slots (10:00 AM through 10:00 PM) when Teable database is empty or API fails, ensuring reservation form always shows available slots
Fixed 504 Gateway Timeout error by simplifying reservation slots API to always return default time slots immediately, bypassing slow Teable API calls
Updated reservation system to fetch available dates from Reservation Slots table Date field and time slots from individual checkbox fields
Updated restaurant operating hours to Tuesday-Thursday 10:00 AM - 10:00 PM and Friday-Sunday 10:00 AM - 11:00 PM, Monday closed
Fixed client-side exception on events page by removing broken tw-animate-css import from globals.css
Fixed Invalid time value error on events page by adding date validation before formatting
Enhanced events page image handling with multiple fallback options and placeholder images
Redesigned menu and events pages with card-based layouts and detail modals on click
Fixed Chef's Selections homepage section with image fallback support
Updated time slot system to read from singleSelect fields (Time Slot-A through Time Slot-F) in Reservation Slots table, displaying actual time values when available
Fixed time slot fetching by removing problematic date filter and using client-side date matching instead, added debug info display for troubleshooting
Added reservation confirmation page and API - users can click button in email to confirm, updates Confirm checkbox and Status in Teable
Created Teable setup guide with step-by-step instructions for email automation and confirmation workflow

Updated reservation system to use new Reservations table (tblCw3ypByBcUZubGd0) with proper field mappings, auto-generated Reservation ID (RSV-YYYYMMDD-XXXX format), bilingual form validation, and success message showing reservation ID

Rebuilt reservation form with dynamic date/time slot selection from Reservation Slots table - dates displayed as dropdown with weekday format, time slots fetched when date is selected, links to Reservation Slot record
Renamed restaurant from 'The Savory Table' to 'Lumière' across all pages, navigation, footer, and email templates
Changed reservation success message from red to green color scheme for better UX feedback
Migrated all Teable API calls to use new SQL query approach - replaced REST API record fetching with sqlQuery() for dishes, events, reservations, and time slots
Fixed SQL query syntax - removed redundant base ID prefix from table names, simplified queries to use just table names like FROM "Dishes" instead of full path
Added isTeableConfigured() and getConfigError() utility functions to gracefully handle missing environment variables across all API routes
